title: Bus Arbitration Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequence of steps involved in a centralized, parallel bus arbitration system, from a device requesting bus access to being granted control and releasing the bus.
relationships: Device sends request on Bus Request Line
Arbiter grants bus to highest priority device via Bus Grant Line
Winning device acknowledges and uses bus, setting Bus Busy Line
Device completes transfer and releases bus, clearing Bus Busy Line
